description: PMXT Deliverable C external_knowledge seed corpus v1. Seven practitioner and community docs covering Polymarket/Kalshi fee structures, pmxt SDK gotchas, sports strategy catalogue, cross-platform price divergence, SimTrader limitations, and cross-platform market matching. source_family=external_knowledge (12-month half-life per freshness_decay.json). All entries use structured_markdown extractor.

entries.title: Polymarket Fee Structure (April 2026)
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. Secondary notes + corrections; verify against primary Polymarket docs before treating as definitive. Covers taker fee formula C*feeRate*p*(1-p), category rate table, maker rebate mechanics (daily pool, not per-fill), rebate splits (crypto 20%, others 25%), and Q-score vs maker rebate distinction.

entries.title: Kalshi Fee Structure (April 2026)
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. SOURCE QUALITY CAUTION: secondary references only. Verify against official Kalshi docs. Covers fee=round_up(0.07*C*P*(1-P)), rounding semantics, maker/taker distinction, fee_waiver fields, LIP program, and cross-platform normalization requirements.

entries.title: pmxt SDK Operational Gotchas
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. SOURCE QUALITY CAUTION: attribute to LEARNINGS.md / hermes-pmxt snapshot, not official pmxt docs. Covers fetch_market unreliability, slug vs keyword lookup, outcome_id requirements, price normalization, sidecar port 3847, Jaccard 40% threshold, true-arbitrage-is-rare finding.

entries.title: Sports Strategy Catalogue
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. SOURCE QUALITY CAUTION: mixed-license upstream files; seed behavioral summaries and parameters only, no code. Covers SportsMomentum (final_period_minutes=30, entry=0.80), SportsFavorite (entry=0.90, hold-to-resolution), SportsVWAP (window=80, entry_threshold=0.008). No published backtest results.

entries.title: Cross-Platform Price Divergence Empirics
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. HIGHEST-PRIORITY SOURCE QUALITY CAUTION: figures (15-20% gap frequency, 5% threshold) derive from secondary reference to AhaSignals March 2026 tracker; primary source URL and archived snapshot not verified. Seeded by Director decision with embedded caution. Treat all figures as indicative pending primary source confirmation.

entries.title: SimTrader Known Limitations (Verified)
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: PRACTITIONER. validation_status: UNTESTED. Composite document: Section A verified against PolyTool SimTrader codebase; Section B corroborated by external backtesting repo notes. Do not conflate source sections. Covers no-queue-position, no-L3, no-impact, no-alpha-decay, fills-do-not-deplete-book.

entries.title: Cross-Platform Market Matching
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: freshness_tier: CURRENT. confidence_tier: COMMUNITY. validation_status: UNTESTED. SOURCE QUALITY CAUTION: matcher.js described second-hand from hermes-pmxt notes; no published accuracy metrics or benchmark set found. Keep COMMUNITY confidence. Covers Jaccard 40% baseline, hybrid Jaccard+Levenshtein direction, shared-keyword failure mode, downstream impact on divergence stats.
